_comment: PRIVATE grant pipeline — human-maintained. Never published to the public site (test-guarded). Track ideas → submission → result. Do NOT put confidential consortium detail or unannounced budgets in a public repo; keep sensitive figures in a private store and reference by id. research_os.py summarises counts/stages only and never fabricates a grant.

grants.working_title: (example) Replace with a real grant idea
grants.notes: Template entry. Delete and add real grant activity. Aggregate counts only appear in reports/grant-dashboard.md; nothing here is published to the public site.
